title: MaterialTweaker
description: MaterialTweaker is a modpack utility for modifying armor and tool repair materials and attributes.
body:
Material Tweaker is a modpack utility for modifying armor and tool materials, allowing you to change material attributes, as well as what items those materials use to repair durability with.

Attributes such as damage, durability, toughness, enchantability, etc. can all be changed on a material-by-material basis.

Even vanilla materials such as wood, iron, and diamond can be modified using this utility through a custom config system.

Any item can be set as a repair item for a material, allowing you to do things such as make iron swords repaired with a whetstone, or leather armor repaired with leather strips.

There is an additional config for setting repair items on an item-by-item basis, instead of whole materials, allowing you to set different repair items for specific tools.

Even normally unrepairable items such as bows can have a repair material set using this config.
